name: Spiced Banana Cake with Cinnamon and Walnut T
recipeInstructions: Beat butter and sugar until well blended. Add eggs and water, beating to combine. Stir in mashed bananas. Mix in the remaining ingredients until a smooth batter forms. Pour into a greased springform pan. Combine 2 tablespoons cinnamon and chopped walnuts. Sprinkle over the batter evenly. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
